englishDefinitions: To leave a partner or commitment suddenly and without prior warning.
To leave a restaurant without paying the bill; to dine and dash.
persianTranslation: ترک یک شریک یا تعهد به طور ناگهانی و بدون هشدار قبلی.
ترک رستوران بدون پرداخت قبض؛ ناهار خوردن و دویدن
examples: No one could believe that John had run out on his wife and kids.
I saw him run out on the check at an Applebee's.
